what_it_does: Defines a 24x24 SVG globe icon using stroked circle, ellipse, and horizontal path elements.
observations: Uses an SVG viewBox of 0 0 24 24 with explicit width and height of 24.
Sets fill to none and stroke to currentColor.
Uses stroke width 1.5 with round line caps and joins.
Draws an outer circle centered at 12,12 with radius 9.
Draws a vertical ellipse centered at 12,12 with rx 5 and ry 9.
Draws three horizontal bands at y=9, y=12, and y=15.
standouts: The globe form is built from simple geometric primitives.
Multiple horizontal latitude-like lines are combined into one path.
conventions: Follows a common 24x24 stroke icon format.
Uses no fill and rounded stroke styling.
Keeps the SVG inline and compact.
notes: A compact currentColor globe icon made from an outer circle, central ellipse, and horizontal bands.
purpose_vs_actual: The filename indicates a globe icon, and the SVG content draws a globe-like symbol.
intention_signals: It appears intended to provide a reusable globe/world icon that can adapt to surrounding text or UI color.
contribution: Contributes a simple themeable globe symbol with clear 24x24 stroke geometry for representing global, language, or web-related concepts.
summary_for_embedding: A 24x24 currentColor SVG globe icon composed of an outer circle, a vertical ellipse, and three horizontal bands.
intention_for_embedding: This file was for supplying a reusable globe/world icon in a stroke-based design system asset set.
